payload.title: WhatsApp Flows
payload.query_preview: for whatsapp on gupshup, is direct peer-to-peer chat between a customer and a delivery executive supported as a native flow? if not, what documented or platform-aligned workaround is feasible for coordination between customer and delivery executive?
